markdownRemark.html:
1. DDL(Data Define Language) CREATE / ALTER / DROP
  2. 데이터 베이스 생성 구문 CREATE DATABASE [database name] CHARACTER SET [character set]; CREATE DATABASE mysqltest CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4general_ci;
  3. 테이블 작성/변경/삭제 Syntax CREATE TABLE [table] (column1, column2 …) ALTER TABLE [table] ADD [column] [datatype] DROP TABLE [table];
  4. DML(Data Manipulation Language) INSERT / DELETE / UPDATE
  5. Syntax INSERT INTO [table] VALUES (value1, value2, value3…) SELECT * FROM [table]; DELETE FROM [table] WHERE [condition] UPDATE [table] SET [column]=[value] WHERE [condition]
